title: Where It All Began
dek: Koko and Momo met in Hefei on February 22, 2024.
narrative: Every love story has a beginning. For Koko and Momo, it was a winter day in Hefei that changed everything.

title: Wuhan Spring
dek: From holding hands to becoming a couple, Wuhan witnessed the blossoming of their relationship.
narrative: March 16, 2024 - their hands found each other for the first time. The next day, March 17, they officially became a couple.
The spring days in Wuhan were filled with new discoveries, shared laughter, and the excitement of a relationship just beginning.
mapCaption: Wuhan - where they held hands and became a couple.

title: Summer Adventures
dek: Hefei revisited and a first international journey to Singapore.
narrative: June brought them back to Hefei, the city where they first met, now seeing it through different eyes as a couple.
Their first international adventure together took them to Singapore, creating memories beyond borders.
mapCaption: From Hefei to Singapore - summer travels.

title: Beijing: The Long Chapter
dek: Multiple stays in Beijing spanning from summer 2024 through 2025.
narrative: Beijing became a recurring chapter in their story. The first summer together from June to August 2024 established the city as a special place.
They returned in March 2025, and then spent an extended period from May to August 2025, deepening their connection to the city and to each other.

title: New Horizons
dek: Momo's journey to California and back, marking new adventures ahead.
narrative: March 2026 brought a new chapter as Momo traveled to California, experiencing new places before returning to China.
Distance and travel became part of their story, but the connection remained strong.
